data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making to improve user task efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Limits options on the user interface to enhance decision speed.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Guides design of interactive elements for accessibility and ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Focuses on reducing the distance between interactions on UI layout.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Chunking content into groups of seven to improve usability and user retention.
data.technical_spec: Optimizes information clustering on webpages for better cognitive processing.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer a consistent experience similar to other services they use.
data.technical_spec: Standardizes page navigation and visual consistency with intuitive design.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Increases engagement by intentionally setting incomplete tasks or information.
data.technical_spec: Implements progressive disclosure on content reveal and form completion.
